changeSummary: Adds a step-by-step table manual with inline spreadsheet-like data.
Fixes broken clear-link examples from class=".clear" to class="clear".
Fixes template id mismatch from tableTemplate to siteTable_template so the example matches the JavaScript options.
verification: npm install completed with dependency vulnerability warnings from old packages.
npm run lint failed on pre-existing style issues in test/browserify.js and test/data.js; README-only patch does not touch those files.
submissionBlocker: gh is not authenticated, and creating an external fork/PR to jlord/sheetsee-tables requires GitHub account authorization.
